import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut tokens: List<Int> = []
    mut current = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          if not string.is_empty(current)
            match string.parse_int(current)
            when Some(v)
              tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v * v)
            when None
              ()
            end
            current = ""
          end
        else
          current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v * v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    let m = tokens.len()
    while j < m
      match tokens.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    print(out)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
